name: Cruel world RPG
description:
"Limgrave" is cruel. Slave trade, corruption and violence flourish. In this world, a small geography and races with their properties and character are prescribed.

Your goal is to survive. Either you, or you.

Choose the direction in which your torment will begin, that is, the journey.

Good luck...

Recommendations: Enter key events, goals and tasks into the bot's memory. Also, be sure to enter into the bot's memory the character and appearance of your travel companions, so that the bot does not simply forget them and their attitude towards you :3
Also, be sure to write down your "persona" so that the bot understands who you are and what you can do.

For example = John Doe's eyes were gouged out, now he is blind. John Doe has the mark of a slave, because of which he is treated like dirt.

Upd. Suggest a variety of races and details about geography and just your ideas for improving "Limgrave", the author loves to read comments, even the most delirious ones :3
creator: TheVitaminF
